task: Find an editor's choice review with a score of 10 in the boardgame category on ign.
graderReasoning: The agent found a valid IGN board game review meeting the criteria and provided the correct article link. Evidence from the final page snapshot at https://www.ign.com/articles/undaunted-stalingrad-board-game-review shows the article title “Undaunted: Stalingrad Board Game Review” and explicitly displays “10 EDITORS' CHOICE” with “masterpiece.” The page also identifies the item under “Tabletop” and the article text refers to it as a board game, satisfying the boardgame category requirement.
final_result_response:
Found one: **Undaunted: Stalingrad Board Game Review** by Matt Thrower.

IGN lists it as **10**, **EDITORS’ CHOICE**, and **masterpiece** in its board game review page. <citation refs="search_ae43000f2d954e95b531a9cce4c9c713#1">“Undaunted: Stalingrad Board Game Review … 10 EDITORS' CHOICE … masterpiece”</citation>

Link: https://www.ign.com/articles/undaunted-stalingrad-board-game-review
action_history: Opening IGN: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.ign.com/');
Opening IGN board game reviews: await page.locator('e105').click();
